details.text: This resource is not allowed to be a matchetype resource (extension http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/matchetype is true)
The type 'code' does not appear to match the matchetype pattern value '$uuid$'
Because the expansion uses system 'http://hl7.org/fhir/test/CodeSystem/big' without a version, it should list the system using the expansion parameter 'used-codesystem'
